title: Facility
description: An NYC Health + Hospitals care location — an acute-care hospital, a Gotham Health federally qualified health center, a post-acute / long-term-care (nursing) facility, a behavioral-health site, or a Correctional Health Services location. The core physical unit of the system. FHIR-aligned: a Facility corresponds to a FHIR Location (the physical place) plus its owning Organization. H+H does NOT publish a facility directory to NYC Open Data, and the public website (nychealthandhospitals.org) is behind a Radware bot manager; the machine-readable twin is the auth-gated FHIR Location/Organization resources on epicproxypda.nychhc.org.

facilityId.description: H+H facility identifier (maps to FHIR Location.id).

npi.description: Facility National Provider Identifier, if any.

emergencyServices.description: Whether the facility operates an Emergency Department.

traumaCenter.description: Whether the facility is a designated trauma center.

servicesOffered.description: Service lines / specialties available at this facility.
